steps.title: Identify the source of her artistic material
steps.content: She is “drawing from memories of her childhood in Texas or details of her current surroundings”—direct experience fuels her creative work.

steps.title: Match the correct answer
steps.content: ”Inspired by” means direct experience motivates and shapes her artistic choices. The other three describe unrelated relationships: “complimented by” suggests external praise, “uncertain about” suggests doubt, and “unbothered by” suggests indifference. That matches choice D — D is correct.
